title: Purwa Falls

overview.short: The Purwa Falls is a waterfall on the Tamsa River in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: The Purwa Falls is a waterfall on the Tamsa River in Rewa district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is located in Semariya, a town in Rewa district, near Basavan Mama, a sacred and tourist place.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Purwa Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Purwa Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Purwa Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Prayagraj Airport (Bamrauli) (87 km) and the nearest railway station is Satna Junction (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Purwa Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Purwa Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Purwa Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Purwa Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
